description: I Love You Coin (ILUC) emerged in 2023 on BSC, and later on Ethereum and Solana, as a gift-given memecoin based on “I luck” rooted in love, kindness, and positive energy. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 ILUC gives all holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: I Love You Coin
